title: fix: use Connect as the account menu label, prevent wrapping
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Unifies the account-control wording and fixes the label wrapping seen on narrow widths (e.g. standalone websim, /play on mobile).

- Shared `AppUserMenu` default label `Authorize app` → `Connect`, so standalone apps (playground, websim) and the `/play` host all show one consistent word. Previously it was split: `Authorize app` (default), `Log in` (/play override), `sign in` (site prose).
- Make the control `shrink-0` and the login label `whitespace-nowrap` so it keeps its full width in a header flex row instead of breaking onto two lines.
- Playground/websim pick this up via `app-deploy`. The website rebuild branch inherits it on the next `main` merge and can then drop its `labels={{ authorize: ... }}` override.

gist.headline: A cleaner connection
gist.blurb: We've unified the login button text to a simple 'Connect' across all apps and fixed a pesky text-wrapping issue on mobile screens. A small but mighty UI polish!
gist.summary: Unified the AppUserMenu label to 'Connect' across all standalone apps and applied whitespace-nowrap to prevent the button text from breaking on narrow screens.
gist.impact: Users on mobile devices and narrow windows will see a consistent, single-line 'Connect' button instead of wrapped text.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot fixing a UI button sign that says 'CONNECT', while the robot holds a mobile phone showing a clean interface.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, adjusting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) button that says 'CONNECT' in pixel font. A chunky pixel robot companion holds up a small mobile phone screen showing a clean interface. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
